TestConfig.name: Test Excel Transformation
TestConfig.StartingText: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <XCSExcelBook> <XCSExcelSheet name="SU Accounts"> <XCSExcelRow> <PatientName>Patient Name</PatientName> <SpecimenNumber>Specimen#</SpecimenNumber> <PatientAccountNumber>Patient Acct#</PatientAccountNumber> <OrigSOUTDate>Orig SOUT Date</OrigSOUTDate> </XCSExcelRow> <XCSExcelRow> <PatientName>LOCKARD,DEBORAH LYNN</PatientName> <SpecimenNumber>SU23:LSU:2666</SpecimenNumber> <PatientAccountNumber>W72408298076</PatientAccountNumber> <OrigSOUTDate>08/10/23</OrigSOUTDate> </XCSExcelRow> </XCSExcelSheet> </XCSExcelBook>

Stage.Identifier: transform@transport=88363 Log to HL7 DFT.6 - Generate Kickout Reports.Directory / File Transport
